use.flag: Install sysvinit compatibility symlinks for halt, init, poweroff, reboot and shutdown

pkgmetadata.longdescription: Dinit is a service supervisor with dependency support which can also act as the system "init" program. It was created with the intention of providing a portable init system with dependency management, that was functionally superior to many extant inits. Development goals include clean design, robustness, portability, usability, and avoiding feature bloat (whilst still handling common - and some less-common - use cases). Dinit is designed to integrate with rather than subsume or replace other system software.
